arts.ttl: Arsenal handed Jonathan David transfer boost ahead of summer after 'snub'
arts.sum: David is coming to the end of his contract at Lille in the summer and is expected to have a host of clubs lining up for his signature. And as for my future, I hope to grow, to become a better player and to play for the biggest clubs in the world, if I can," David revealed to Onze Mondial .

arts.ttl: Arsenal fans now want £22m Premier League midfielder signed as Martin Zubimendi alternative after Tuesday night masterclass
arts.sum: Arsenal are likely to be busy in the summer transfer window as they look to strengthen their ranks in pursuit of silverware. Although the Gunners...

arts.ttl: Furious Chelsea fans protest against Todd Boehly and Clearlake Capital - 'We're not Arsenal'
arts.sum: Todd Boehly has suffered a nightmare spell since replacing Roman Abramovich as Chelsea owner in 2022 after overseeing three sackings and poor signings, with the team sliding down the Premier League table

arts.ttl: Seven players set to miss Nottingham Forest vs Arsenal amid Mikel Arteta injury update
arts.sum: Lewis-Skelly is one of several players that will be unavailable for Arsenal for the clash against Forest. There were worries that Ethan Nwaneri could be a doubt for the Gunners after being substituted in the closing stages of the defeat to Arsenal, but Arteta eased those fears during his latest press conference.

arts.ttl: Mikel Merino: Mikel Arteta's "fish out of water" highlights Arsenal summer transfer failings
arts.sum: Mikel Merino was a "fish out of water" up front in Arsenal's loss to West Ham United, and Mikel Arteta should now consider a formation change, according to Charles Watts.

arts.ttl: 'Very special': Mikel Arteta sends warning to Nottingham Forest as important star returns for Arsenal
arts.sum: He could cause problems on Wednesday...

arts.ttl: Former Arsenal star Aaron Ramsdale secret transfer clause emerges amid Chelsea interest
arts.sum: Ramsdale has made the third-most saves in the Premier League (80) this season behind Matz Sels (84) and Mark Flekken (111), and although he has conceded 41 goals in 18 top-flight matches, the defence he has played behind has not helped his cause at all. According to talkSPORT, there is believed to be a relegation release clause in Ramsdale's contract that is going to allow him to depart Saints this summer IF they drop down to the second tier.

arts.ttl: Team News: Nottingham Forest vs. Arsenal injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Wednesday's Premier League clash between Nottingham Forest and Arsenal.

arts.ttl: 'Could be': Arsenal told about the manager they could appoint if they actually sacked Mikel Arteta one day
Arsenal training detail from Dubai emerges to ramp up Mikel Arteta fury after transfer call
arts.sum: After the success of last season's Dubai trip - with the Gunners going on a storming run during the business end of the campaign - it was thought that Arteta's side could benefit from another trip to the Gulf state. On the back of the 2024 visit, Arsenal emphasised that this campaign's trip was considered into the budget and the players, staff and everyone had a great time and saw the benefit, both from a bonding and a training point of view.
